name: Quin Wake Protocol
description: Full LIFE gateway lifecycle manager for OpenClaw agents. Handles agent registration, Genesis interview, and wake protocol at gateway startup. Injects system health and onboarding instructions into agent context automatically.

agentIdMap.description: Map of OpenClaw agent names to LIFE agent_ids. The 'main' -> 'quin-ea-v1' default is always included.

sessionPrefix.description: Only inject context for session keys with this prefix. Use 'agent:main:' to target only the main agent.

commandTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for each mcporter command.
